name: @intentsolutionsio/wallet-security-auditor
description: Crypto wallet security auditor for reviewing wallet implementations, key management, signing flows, and common vulnerability patterns.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install wallet-security-auditor\\n  or /plugin install wallet-security-auditor@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
